text.message: Why did you rob me? Xd
robbing me with 2 points and no progress so far

blu is the rob now i think
so no point for me to fight red now
i would only dc win in ur position
So you have to screw Game for rest xd
green have u never dc'd to win
what are you even talking about? I haven't done anything yet
now u ask him to block me
When did i ask him to block you?
its gonna take a hail mary
green i will do everything in my power to get you ip blocked if you act like this

can you explain this early game moves?
i can. blu wanted no army comp.
u need to thave board vision to know blu always gonna win this one
ur best position is to stay silent here
stay silent and end on 8 points?
u can win if u move in silence
id rather help u see the board buddy
u could get 2 pts this turn and we wouldnt know
thought u was finna take road or sum?
i wanted to help him take army
